delete.title: Reset dashboard preferences?
delete.message: This will reset your dashboard preferences. Your dashboard layout and saved display settings will be deleted. Your accounts, transactions, categories, tags, budgets, and subscriptions will not be affected. You can configure your dashboard again later.
